name: QA 837
description:
PCP QA Test No. 837

Exercise basic --container option handling in libpcp[_pmda].



Copyright (c) 2015 Red Hat.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2404 reproduce

testStage.description:
PCP QA Test No. 837

Exercise basic --container option handling in libpcp[_pmda].



Copyright (c) 2015 Red Hat.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2404 reproduce
